channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kondoa Residents Advocate for School Feeding Programs
item.description: Residents in Kondoa have expressed support for expanding school feeding programs to improve nutrition and education among children. The initiative aims to address food insecurity by providing regular ...

item.title: NDIC pays up to ₦2 million to customers of 46 failed microfinance banks
item.description: The Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC) has started direct electronic payouts to customers affected by the closure of 46 microfinance banks. Eligible depositors will receive up to ₦2 million ...

item.title: Tesla Faces Profit Decline Amid Ambitious Expansion Plans
item.description: Tesla's second-quarter profits dropped by 5% to $1.1 billion, missing analyst expectations of $53 per share. Despite increased auto sales, weaker profitability was attributed to lower vehicle prices, ...

item.title: President Marcos to honor injured Navy personnel in West Philippine Sea with awards and financial aid
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. will visit two Philippine Navy personnel injured during a confrontation with the Chinese Coast Guard in the West Philippine Sea. During the visit, he will personally con...

item.title: India's Foreign Policy and Economic Relations with China

item.title: President Ruto Criticizes Opposition for Opposing Affordable Housing Programme
item.description: President William Ruto has strongly criticized Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna for opposing his Affordable Housing Programme, calling critics 'brainless' and accusing them of wanting Kenyans to remain in...

item.title: Political Divide Over Ramaphosa's Impeachment Inquiry in South Africa
item.description: The African National Congress (ANC) has proposed a two-stage approach to Parliament's Section 89 impeachment inquiry into President Cyril Ramaphosa over the 2020 Phala Phala farm burglary. The committ...

item.title: Daily Horoscope for July 23, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: This article provides daily horoscope predictions for each zodiac sign on July 23, 2026. Aries experiences a shift in energy as Mercury ends its retrograde phase, restoring clarity to their life. Taur...

item.title: Tanzania's SMEs Struggle with Public Tenders Due to Tech Gaps

item.title: Australian Exporters Seek Tariff Exemptions Amid Trump's New Tariff Threats
item.description: The article details the growing concerns among Australian exporters as the U.S. government prepares to implement new tariffs on 60 countries, including Australia. These tariffs, proposed at 12.5%, are...

item.description: Joan Shawlee (1926–1987) was an American actress and comedienne renowned for her distinctive voice, sharp wit, and memorable roles in classic films and television during Hollywood’s Golden Age. Often ...

item.description: Former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua has publicly criticized President William Ruto's decision to appoint Samuel Muchina to the Nairobi Rivers Commission, arguing the move will deepen public resen...

item.title: Pakistan Condemns India's Unilateral Actions on Indus Water Treaty
item.description: Pakistan has strongly rejected India's unilateral decision to hold the Indus Water Treaty (IWT) in abeyance, calling it 'simply illegal' and a violation of international law. During a United Nations S...
